author: Jalal al-Din al-Suyuti (d. 911 AH)
edition: Dar al-Kutub al-Ilmiyyah, Beirut, 1403 AH / 1983 CE

files.Tabakak_Hufath_Sayuti.pdf: Complete work (cover + content in one file)

significance: Al-Suyuti's supplement to al-Dhahabi's Tadhkirat al-Huffaz, extending coverage to later generations of hadith memorizers. Used alongside Tadhkirat to show continuous chain of recognized authorities.
